faqs.question: Are yellow jackets dangerous to my Valley Stream family?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are aggressive and can sting multiple times, especially when defending their nest. They're particularly dangerous for anyone with allergies and can pose serious risks to children and pets playing in your yard. Professional removal is the safest option.
